description: Ragie is a managed retrieval-augmented generation platform for developers. It handles document ingestion, processing, indexing, retrieval, connectors, and related tooling for building AI applications over private data.
summary: Ragie exposes a bearer-authenticated REST API at https://api.ragie.ai, per-partition streamable-http MCP servers with undocumented connection URLs/auth details, and a `ragie` CLI authenticated via `RAGIE_API_KEY`.
